title: Hermes Agent 5.0 (New Upgrades): HERMES BECAME ULTRA-HERMES!
summary: Hermes Agent 0.16 adds a native desktop app for macOS, Linux, and Windows, remote gateway support to connect to servers, an improved web dashboard with admin controls, fuzzy model search, undo functionality for agent sessions, and enhanced security. The release emphasizes multi-surface accessibility and practical workflow support.
